query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.pipelineType, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals d WHERE d.pipelineId = p.id AND d.status = 'open' AND d.deletedAt IS NULL) as openDeals, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals d WHERE d.pipelineId = p.id AND d.deletedAt IS NULL) as totalDeals FROM pipelines p WHERE p.tenantId = 1 ORDER BY p.id LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.pipelineType, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals d WHERE d.pipelineId = p.id AND d.status = 'open' AND d.deletedAt IS NULL) as openDeals, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deals d WHERE d.pipelineId = p.id AND d.deletedAt IS NULL) as totalDeals FROM pipelines p WHERE p.tenantId = 1 ORDER BY p.id LIMIT 10;
